app.title: VR Video Passthrough Server
app.subtitle: VR DLNA media server with realtime passthrough and 2D->3D
dialog.stop_server_first: Please stop the server first to avoid GPU resource conflicts.
dialog.stop_offline_first: Please stop the offline task first to avoid GPU resource conflicts.
dialog.unsupported_gpu: Unsupported GPU: {gpu} (compute capability {cc}). NVIDIA RTX 20 series or newer is required (compute capability 7.5 or higher).
group.quick_config: Quick Settings (restart server to apply changes)
bg.player_note: Gray works well for MoonVR; pure colors work well for SkyBoxVR.
offline.skip_existing: Skip if target file already exists
modeldl.title: Download required models
modeldl.intro: The selected models are not installed yet. They will be downloaded from Hugging Face. Please confirm the download size below.
video_dirs.label: Video folders
subtitle.frame_required: Load a frame before generating the preview.
subtitle.zoom_hint: Mouse wheel to zoom, hold left button to pan
subtitle.auto_note: Automatically plays same-name .srt/.ass subtitles beside the video, passthrough videos only; original videos are not supported yet.
mode.label: Passthrough mode
offline.time_error_video_missing: Please select a valid video file.
offline.time_error_video_duration: Could not read the video duration, so the time range cannot be validated.
offline.time_error_start_format: Invalid start time format. Use HH:MM:SS.
offline.time_error_end_format: Invalid end time format. Use HH:MM:SS.
offline.time_error_custom_minutes: Custom minutes must be greater than 0.
offline.time_error_start_after_video: Start time cannot be later than the video duration ({duration}).
offline.time_error_end_before_start: End time must be later than start time.
offline.time_error_end_after_video: End time cannot be later than the video duration ({duration}).
offline.time_error_clip_after_video: The clip end time cannot be later than the video duration ({duration}).
offline.time_error_segments_empty: Configure at least one time slice.
offline.time_error_segment_start_format: Segment {row} has an invalid start time. Use HH:MM:SS.
offline.time_error_segment_end_format: Segment {row} has an invalid end time. Use HH:MM:SS.
offline.time_error_segment_order: Segment {row} end time must be later than start time.
offline.time_error_segment_start_after_v: Segment {row} start time cannot be later than the video duration ({duration}).
offline.time_error_segment_end_after_vid: Segment {row} end time cannot be later than the video duration ({duration}).
offline.time_error_segment_overlap: Segment {row} cannot start before the previous segment ends.
subtitle.mode_help_msg:
Both Eyes: subtitles are shown in both left and right eye images. Set the subtitle display distance in meters, ideally matching the scene depth around the subtitles. Otherwise, long viewing may cause eye strain or dizziness.

Single Eye: subtitles are shown only in the left or right eye. Choosing the dominant eye lets the brain read mainly through that eye, which can feel easier and does not require setting a distance.
startup.title_first_run_slow: First-time setup on a new GPU: 1-3 minutes
startup.bootstrapping: The server process is still starting. The first launch may take 1-3 minutes...
startup.bootstrapping_long: The server process is still starting. The first GPU cold start needs to compile kernels for this graphics card; please keep waiting.
startup.hint_known_slow: A newer-generation GPU was detected (such as the RTX 50 series). The first launch needs to compile GPU kernels for this card and usually takes 1-3 minutes. The result is cached, so subsequent launches only take a few seconds. Please wait; you do not need to restart.
startup.hint_failed: Startup failed. Click "Copy hardware report" and paste the text when you ask for help.
startup.reassure.t20: The first launch needs to compile GPU kernels for {gpu}. Please keep waiting...
startup.reassure.t45: Still compiling. Elapsed {elapsed}s. RTX 2080/3000/4000 series cards usually need 30-60s; RTX 50 series cards can need 1-3 minutes.
startup.reassure.t90: Still compiling (elapsed {elapsed}s). This is a one-time first-launch cost; the result is cached and later launches should take only a few seconds. Please do not force close the app, or it may need to compile again next time.
startup.reassure.t180: Elapsed {elapsed}s. If you think startup is stuck, click "Copy hardware report" below and contact support. Otherwise keep waiting; the process is still working.
startup.failed_generic: Server startup failed. See the details below.
offline.matanyone_help_msg: Check the instructions in the models folder, then download the MatAnyone2 models. YOLO26m-EfficientSAM mode needs the YOLO26m and EfficientSAM ONNX models. YOLO26m-BiRefNet mode needs the YOLO26m and BiRefNet ONNX models and at least 11GB VRAM. SAM3 mode needs the SAM3 models and at least 16GB VRAM.
group.performance_config: Performance Settings (restart server to apply changes)
performance.output_fps_help: If the source video frame rate is lower than the selected value, the source frame rate is used.
trt.title: TensorRT Acceleration
trt.build_first_tooltip: Please complete the cache in Configure first.
trt.fps_hint: TensorRT acceleration can significantly improve FPS for realtime playback and offline generation. The first build can take ten-plus minutes; please wait patiently.
trt.description: TensorRT builds FP32 engine caches required by RVM realtime playback and offline precision tiers.
trt.description_matanyone2: TensorRT accelerates the MatAnyone2 per-frame step_update graph with FP32 engines; bootstrap and segment models still use CUDA.
trt.warning: The GPU is busy during the build, which can take ten-plus minutes. Do not play video while building.
trt.source_model_missing: Source ONNX model does not exist: {path}
trt.download_hint: Download TensorRT runtime libraries before building the engine cache.
offline.sam3_prompt_hint:
Basic prompts: "person", "people"
Add attributes: "person in red shirt", "woman with long hair", "man wearing glasses"
Negative prompt: "person without hat".
light_match.title: Light Matching
light_match.help: Adjusts the video subject color to better match your room lighting. Changes apply to playing passthrough video within a moment and do not affect the real room background.
twodvr.live_restart_note: Restart the realtime server after saving for changes to take effect.
si.duck_original_tooltip: When simultaneous interpretation is audible, automatically lower the original video's audio.
si.help_message:
If an audio file with the same base name as the video and the ".SI.WAV" suffix exists, the DLNA server will automatically add a simultaneous interpretation playback entry starting with [SI].

To create simultaneous interpretation or cloned-voice translation files, download my other open-source app: “VR Video Toolbox (CUDA Edition)”.

Download: {link}
problem_help.title: Problems?
problem_help.message:
1. For 4XVR and SKYBOX video players, disable screenshots/file thumbnails in the player settings to avoid GPU contention.
2. If another player has not been adapted yet, contact the developer through GitHub.
